{"match_id": "m002", "winner": "B", "rationale": "A has stronger target signal (6.4 vs 4.8) but B wins on discriminative balance. A's profile (admirable 3.4, disappointing 5.8, needs_attention 5.6) suggests it's a \"fails-everyone\" floor more than a model-ranking discriminator. B's balanced admirable 5.2 / disappointing 4.6 creates clearer model separation — what an Elo seed actually needs.
